description: Processes user-provided text or images. For images, extracts text via vision/OCR capabilities. Cleans, formats, and prepares the final text output ready for typing simulation. Handles multi-line content, preserves formatting, and ensures accuracy.

example_response.extracted_text: The cleaned and formatted extracted text content
example_response.source_type: Whether the input was text or image
example_response.confidence: Confidence level of extraction: high, medium, or low
example_response.notes: Any notes about the extraction, such as uncertain portions or formatting decisions
